Petition For Payment Of Additional Attorneys Fees And Costs For Representation Of Barbara Devries As Trustee Of The Trust
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for (Trustee) Barbara Devries. Sheila Robello for (Beneficiary) Valerie Eisman.

Mr. Siracusa reported that there have been no objections, that everyone is satisfied with the proposed plan, that the 2014 state & federal taxes returns have been paid in the amount of $246,049.00 and that there is $74,000.00 remaining in the tax reserve. Ms. Robello stated that her client had concerns regarding proper funding in the bypass trust but that they are happy with what was filed. The Court granted the petition for accounting (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions Re: Funding Of Contingent And Survivors Trust And Distribution To Charities
Off Calendar Oct-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for (petitioner) Barbara Devries.

Mr. Siracusa reported on the issue of distribution to the American Friends is due to the decedents wishes for the money to be used for women in Viet Nam, however, that charity is no longer doing that work and needs determination as to American Friends remaining as distributee to use the money as to their discretion or to appoint an alternative charity. Mr. Siracusa also stated that a supplement to the petition has been filed addressing the issues of the 706 return, that everyone has been notice and that there have been no objections filed. The petition for instructions was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for and with Barbara De Vries (Trustee).

The sale was confirmed at $1,895,000.00 to Lucinda Quan based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 22, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,551,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order To Bring Trust Under Court Supervision And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Petititon For Order Setting Trustee'S Bond.
Off Calendar Mar-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with PCN-09-293077 (Conservatorship of Beatrice Eisman).

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for and with Laura Brockwehl (Temporary Conservator of the Person) and also for Barbara deVries (Temporary Conservator of the Estate/Temporary Successor Trustee).

The Court stated at the last hearing on March 11, 2010 that it granted the petitions subject to the filing of a proof of service on Derek Martin and continued both matters to today for the proof. There now being proof of service of Derek Martin on file, the Court signed the order appointing Laura Brockwehl as the Conservator of the Person of Beatrice Eisman and appointing Barbara deVries as the Conservator of the Estate of Beatrice Eisman (order for the same signed in open court).

Further orders (per written order):
1. Compliance Status Hearing - July 7, 2010, 9:00a.m., Dept. 204:
2. Assessment Fee - $725 is charged.
3. First Account & Status Report - filed one week before June 1, 2011.
4. The Conservatee may maintain a credit card with a balance $2,000.00 for which the Conservator need not account.
5. The Conservatee may maintain a checking account on the Trust not to exceed $3,000.00 for which the Conservator need not account.
No bond is required on the conservatorship matter.

As to the Trust matter, the Court also stated it would sign the order bringing the Beatrice Eisman et al Trust under Court supervision, appointing Barbara deVries as Successor Trustee of the Beatrice Eisman Trust, and setting bond (subject to review of the written order).

Further orders (per written order):
1. Inventory and Appraisal - filed two weeks before July 7, 2010.
2. First Account - filed two weeks before June 1, 2011.
Bond is set at $829,000.00.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Court Investigator: Cynthia Jones. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
